verses.arabicText: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ صٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ
verses.translationText: Sad. By the Qur'an containing reminder...

verses.arabicText: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍۢ وَشِقَاقٍۢ
verses.translationText: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension.

verses.arabicText: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍۢ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍۢ
verses.translationText: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

verses.arabicText: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ ۖ وَقَالَ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا سَٰحِرٌۭ كَذَّابٌ
verses.translationText: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar.

verses.arabicText: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْءَالِهَةَ إِلَٰهًۭا وَٰحِدًا ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌۭ
verses.translationText: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing."

verses.arabicText: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَىْءٌۭ يُرَادُ
verses.translationText: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended.

verses.arabicText: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهَٰذَا فِى ٱلْمِلَّةِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخْتِلَٰقٌ
verses.translationText: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication.

verses.arabicText: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ مِّن ذِكْرِى ۖ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِ
verses.translationText: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

verses.arabicText: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ
verses.translationText: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?

verses.arabicText: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَلْيَرْتَقُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَسْبَٰبِ
verses.translationText: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access.

verses.arabicText: جُندٌۭ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
verses.translationText: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].

verses.arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ وَعَادٌۭ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
verses.translationText: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] 'Aad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,

verses.arabicText: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍۢ وَأَصْحَٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ
verses.translationText: And [the tribe of] Thamud and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket. Those are the companies.

verses.arabicText: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
verses.translationText: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified.

verses.arabicText: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍۢ
verses.translationText: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.

verses.arabicText: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.translationText: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account"
